No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters cultural understanding ('認識...多元文化'), aligning with Target 4.7's emphasis on global citizenship and cultural diversity.
evidence: 擴大學習者藉由閱讀認識德國及德語區國家之多元文化

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops professional translation skills ('培養學生獨立完成...翻譯能力') and covers economic texts ('報導文本 (經貿)'), directly supporting productive employment (Target 8.5) and economic productivity (Target 8.2).
evidence: 培養學生獨立完成一般篇章之翻譯能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Promoting intercultural understanding ('認識...多元文化') and global mobility ('國際交流基本知能') can indirectly contribute to reducing inequalities by fostering inclusion and breaking down barriers (Target 10.2).
evidence: 擴大學習者藉由閱讀認識德國及德語區國家之多元文化
具備國際交流基本知能 Abilities of global mobility

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The 'Respect Copyright' instruction is too tenuous a link to the core targets of SDG 12, which focus on resource efficiency, waste, and sustainable practices.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。 Respect Copyright.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate change.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Translating political texts ('報導文本 (政治)') can facilitate public access to information across languages, contributing to transparent institutions (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing international communication skills ('國際交流基本知能') is crucial for knowledge sharing and building effective global partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
evidence: 具備國際交流基本知能 Abilities of global mobility
